examples: In fact, it's keratin which makes them flexible and without it they would be very rigid.
Now hair, whatever it is for and wherever it is on the human body, is composed mainly of a protein called keratin.
The alpha helix is found in muscle protein and keratin.
The peptide enhances production of keratin, a protein that is a major component of hair, according to Symrise.
The fibres in feathers are almost entirely composed of keratin, a protein also found in hair and nails.
